content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Mswc60cover.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Star Wars (1977) 60|''Star Wars'' (1977) 60]] released in 1982.]]

A list of events in '''1982''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 4|04]] – ''[[Traitor's Gambit]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[January 11|11]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] begins.
*[[January 19|19]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]] released.
*[[January 24|24]] – [[Daveed Diggs]] is born.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 153|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 153]] published.

==February==
*[[February 8|08]] – [[Liam McIntyre]] is born.
*[[February 16|16]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]] released.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 154|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 154]] published.

==March==
*[[March 8|08]] – ''[[The Night Beast]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[March 11|11]] – [[Robbie Daymond]] is born.
*[[March 16|16]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 60|''Star Wars'' (1977) 60]] released.
*[[March 18|18]] – [[Adam Pally]] is born.

==April==
*[[April 1|1]] – [[Taran Killam]] is born.
*[[April 13|13]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' (1977) 61]] released.
*[[April 16|16]] – [[Gina Carano]] is born.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 155|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 155]] published.

==May==
*[[May 16|16]] – [[Tiya Sircar]] is born.
*[[May 17|17]] – ''[[The Return of Ben Kenobi]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[May 18|18]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 62|''Star Wars'' (1977) 62]] released.
*[[May 20|20]] – Filming for ''Return of the Jedi'' ends.
*?? – [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'']] is released on home video by 20th Century Fox Video in May as a Video Rental Library edition.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 156|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 156]] published.

==June==
*[[June 3|3]] – [[Sebastian Armesto]] is born.
*[[June 15|15]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 63|''Star Wars'' (1977) 63]] released.
*[[June 22|22]] – [[Alan Webb]] dies.
*[[June 29|29]] – [[Matthew Mercer]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Space Adventure Game]]'' is released.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 157|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 157]] published.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 158|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 158]] published.

==July==
*[[July 13|13]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 64|''Star Wars'' (1977) 64]] released.
*[[July 26|26]] – ''[[The Power Gem]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*?? – [[Nathan Larkins]] is born.
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 159|''Star Wars Monthly'' 159]] published.

==August==
*[[August 13|13]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] (re-issue)
*[[August 17|17]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 65|''Star Wars'' (1977) 65]] released.
*[[August 17|17]] – [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 2|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 2]] published.
*[[August 25|25]] – [[Ben Diskin]] is born.
*[[August 26|26]] – [[Nazneen Contractor]] is born.
*[[August 31|31]] – [[G. Willow Wilson]] is born.
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 160|''Star Wars Monthly'' 160]] published.

==September==
*[[September 14|14]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 66|''Star Wars'' (1977) 66]] released.
*[[September 23|23]] – [[Gene Day]] dies.
*?? – [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Star Wars]] is released on home video by 20th Century Fox Video for general consumer release.
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 161|''Star Wars Monthly'' 161]] published.

==October==
*[[October 2|02]] – [[Amanda Hale]] is born.
*[[October 4|04]] – ''[[Iceworld]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[October 12|12]] – ''[[The Jedi Master's Quizbook]]'' is released.
*[[October 19|19]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 67|''Star Wars'' (1977) 67]] released.
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 162|''Star Wars Monthly'' 162]] published.

==November==
*[[November 15|15]] – ''[[It's a Trap]] ''serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[November 16|16]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 68|''Star Wars'' (1977) 68]] released.
*[[November 19|19]] – [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] (re-issue)
*?? – [[Marvel Movie Showcase 1|''Marvel Movie Showcase'' 1]] released.
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 163|''Star Wars Monthly'' 163]] published.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – [[Riz Ahmed]] is born.
*[[December 14|14]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 69|''Star Wars'' (1977) 69]] released.
*[[December 21|21]] – [[Luis Antonio Delgado]] is born.
*[[December 29|29]] – [[Alison Brie]] is born.
*?? – [[Marvel Movie Showcase 2|''Marvel Movie Showcase'' 2]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Monthly 164|''Star Wars Monthly'' 164]] published.

==Miscellaneous==
*[[Dominic Burgess]] is born.
*[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (video game)|The Empire Strikes Back video game]] is released.
*[[The Making of Star Wars]] reissued on video.
*[[The Empire Strikes Back Coloring Book (1982)|''The Empire Strikes Back Coloring Book'']] is released.
*The ''[[Star Wars Micro Collection]]'' is released.
*[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (toy line)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' toy line]] is released.
*[[Kenner Products|Kenner]] releases action figures of:
**[[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]]
**[[General/Legends|General]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Veers]] aka 'AT-AT Commander'
**[[Storm IV Twin-Pod cloud car/Legends|Cloud Car]] Pilot
**[[TIE pilot]]
**[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] Removable Limbs
**[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] with Sensorscope
**[[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]]
**[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] gear
**[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Isdam Edian/Legends|Edian]] aka '[[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Bespin Security Guard]] (black)'

----
{{Years-RealWorld}}
